headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://www.google-analytics.com; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' https://www.google.com/recaptcha/ https://www.gstatic.com/recaptcha/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://www.google.com/recaptcha/ https://recaptcha.google.com/recaptcha/; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
